packages.name: qa-gate
packages.description: Independent QA audits: tasks reaching review get a one-shot auditor that re-verifies the criteria; failures bounce back with findings. Ships its own QA-officer agent you can chat with.

packages.name: session-bell
packages.description: Notifications when any session finishes or asks for input; adds a ping_all_sessions tool for Master.

packages.name: cost-pulse
packages.description: Live per-session spend bar chart as a tab.

packages.name: kanban-lite
packages.description: The built-in kanban board as a pure addon (proof of the addon platform).

packages.name: workflows
packages.description: Task pipelines as a DAG — draw nodes and dependency edges, run the graph on demand or on a cron, and watch runs advance as their board tasks finish. Drag-and-drop editor + run history.

packages.name: github-issues
packages.description: Pulls open GitHub issues on a schedule into a review queue; add them to the board yourself or let the addon's customizable triage agent file the tasks. Token stays in the OS keychain.

packages.name: usage-limit-rescheduler
packages.description: Tasks that failed on an API usage/rate limit get automatically rescheduled for right after the limit resets — detected from session output or the Anthropic usage API.
